name: Reliance Industries Limited
description: Reliance is India's largest company by market capitalisation, with interests spanning energy, retail, digital services, and materials. The group operates the Jio digital ecosystem and India's largest organised retail chain. Headquarters: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

name: Tata Consultancy Services
description: TCS is a global IT services and consulting firm and among the world's largest employers in technology services. It delivers enterprise software, cloud, and AI-led transformation for clients worldwide. Headquarters: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

name: HDFC Bank
description: HDFC Bank is one of India's largest private-sector banks, offering retail and corporate banking, cards, and digital payments across thousands of branches. Headquarters: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

name: ICICI Bank
description: ICICI Bank provides retail, corporate, and investment banking with a strong digital footprint and international presence. Headquarters: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

name: Infosys

name: State Bank of India
description: SBI is India's largest public-sector bank, with the widest branch network and a full range of retail, SME, and corporate banking products. Headquarters: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

name: Life Insurance Corporation
description: LIC is India's largest life insurer, with a dominant agency network and diversified investments across Indian equities and debt. Headquarters: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

name: Bharti Airtel
description: Airtel is a leading South Asian telecom operator providing mobile, broadband, enterprise, and digital TV services. Headquarters: New Delhi, India.

name: ITC Limited

name: Kotak Mahindra Bank

name: Axis Bank

name: Maruti Suzuki India

name: Wipro
